channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu
channel.description: Independent Tesla guides and analysis for European drivers, written by an owner.

item.title: Tesla in Europe, Week of July 24, 2026: France Blocks the FSD Fast Track
item.description: France became the first EU government to publicly reject the Dutch-led FSD approval route, Tesla's Q2 profit fell 57% on record revenue, and Grok went Europe-wide. What it means for European buyers.

item.title: Tesla Q2 2026 Earnings: Why TSLA Fell 14.5% on Record Revenue
item.description: Tesla's gross profit actually rose 22% in Q2 2026. Operating income still fell 57%. A line-by-line read of the 10-Q showing what really collapsed: operating expenses, energy margins, and regulatory credits.

item.title: 11 Tesla Accessories I Actually Bought and Still Use (Owner Review, 2026)
item.description: Not a scraped top-10 list: eleven Model Y and Model 3 accessories from my own Amazon order history, what each one does, and honest notes after months of daily use.

item.title: Tesla in Europe, July 2026: Sales Rebound, Prices, FSD, and a Buyer Checklist
item.description: Tesla's European comeback in numbers: June registrations by country, what drove record Q2 deliveries, Model YL and Model 3 Standard, FSD status, and what to verify before ordering.

item.title: Tesla Model Y L Launches in the US at $61,990: What European Buyers Now Know
item.description: Tesla just launched the 6-seat Model Y L in the US at $61,990 with confirmed specs. Here is what that reveals for European family buyers still stuck with the cramped 7-seat option, and what to verify.

item.title: Tesla Q2 2026: Record Deliveries, a 7% Sell-Off, and the Valuation Question
item.description: Tesla delivered a record 480,126 vehicles in Q2 2026 and the stock still fell 7%. What drove the beat, why the market sold it, and what to watch into July 22 earnings.

item.title: Tesla and SpaceX Merger Watch: The Evidence Tracker (July 2026)
item.description: Will SpaceX acquire Tesla? An evidence-based tracker with confidence tiers: what is officially filed, what is credible signal, what is noise. Status: no announced transaction.

item.title: Tesla Model 3 vs VW ID.3 2026 — Price, Range & Features Compared | TeslaBlog.eu
item.description: Tesla Model 3 vs VW ID.3 in Europe 2026: side-by-side comparison of price, range, charging speed, features and 3-year cost of ownership. Which affordable EV wins?

item.title: Tesla Model Y vs BMW iX3 2026: Price, Range & Features Compared
item.description: Tesla Model Y vs BMW iX3 in Europe 2026: side-by-side comparison of price, range, charging speed, features and cost of ownership. Find out which premium EV wins for your needs.

item.title: Tesla Stock 2026: AI5 Chip, SpaceX IPO & the $8.5 Trillion Question | TeslaBlog.eu
item.description: Data-driven analysis of TSLA in April 2026: the AI5 chip milestone, SpaceX's $1.75T IPO, merger odds, and what Musk's $1T pay package means for shareholders.

item.title: Tesla FSD vs Enhanced Autopilot Europe 2026: Which to Buy?
item.description: Feature-by-feature comparison of Tesla FSD Supervised vs Enhanced Autopilot in Europe. Pricing, capabilities, and which option is right for your driving needs in 2026.

item.title: Tesla FSD Netherlands 2026: Live Now — Price & Setup
item.description: Tesla FSD is live in the Netherlands (RDW approved March 2026). Pricing, activation steps & compatibility for Dutch Tesla owners.

item.title: Tesla FSD Price Europe 2026 — How Much Will It Cost?
item.description: Tesla FSD pricing in Europe for 2026: one-time purchase vs monthly subscription, US vs EU price comparison, and Enhanced Autopilot vs FSD — what you get for the money.

item.title: When Will Tesla FSD Come to My Country? Full Europe Guide (2026)
item.description: Country-by-country Tesla FSD status for Germany, France, Italy, Spain, UK, Norway, Austria, and Switzerland. Regulatory bodies, current status, and expected timelines for FSD Supervised in Europe.

item.title: Germany EV Subsidy Is Back: Up to €6,000 Off Your Tesla in 2026
item.description: Germany restored EV subsidies in 2026 — up to €6,000 back on your Tesla, retroactive to January 1. Eligibility, income limits, how to combine with referral code carlo719460 for maximum savings.

item.title: Tesla Model 3 Price Drop Europe 2026: Save €4,000
item.description: Tesla Model 3 is €4,000 cheaper in Italy, Spain, Portugal & Luxembourg via Tesla Bonus (2026).

item.title: Cheapest Country to Buy a Tesla in Europe 2026 — Price Comparison by Country
item.description: Buying a Tesla in Europe in 2026? We compare Model 3 & Model Y prices across 10 countries — including Norway, Switzerland, Germany, France & Portugal. See where you save the most.

item.title: Tesla FSD Early Access in Europe 2026: Invites Rolling Out Now, Rebrand & V14 Lite Explained
item.description: Tesla FSD Early Access invites are now going out to European owners (March 2026). Netherlands RDW approved FSD in Feb 2026. Tesla renamed FSD to Navigate on Autosteer. V14 Lite coming June 2026.

item.title: Tesla in Norway 2026: The Complete Buyer's Guide (Prices, Tax & Referral Code)
item.description: Tesla in Norway 2026: prices in NOK, zero purchase tax, VAT exemption, 98% EV market. Referral benefits apply only when a referral is active; verify before ordering.<meta name=

item.title: Tesla Referral Program March 2026 Update: What Changed (And What Didn't)
item.description: Tesla just changed its referral program — but NOT in Europe. Each owner code has a yearly referral limit, and this site's code is currently capped for 2026. Here is what changed for EU buyers.<meta name=

item.title: Tesla Roadster Europe 2026 — April 1 Reveal, Price & EU Availability
item.description: Tesla Roadster finally reveals on April 1, 2026. What European buyers need to know: specs, price (~€180K+), EU delivery timeline, and how to order with a referral code.

item.title: Tesla Referral Code Denmark 2026 (Anbefalingskode): How It Works
item.description: Tesla referral code Denmark 2026. How the Tesla referral code works in 2026, its current status, and how to verify an active referral before ordering.<meta name=

item.title: Tesla Referral Code Finland 2026 (Suosittelukoodi): How It Works
item.description: Tesla referral code Finland 2026. How the Tesla referral code works in 2026, its current status, and how to verify an active referral before ordering.<meta name=

item.title: Tesla Referral Code Ireland 2026: How It Works
item.description: Tesla referral code Ireland 2026. How the Tesla referral code works in 2026, its current status, and how to verify an active referral before ordering.<meta name=

item.title: Tesla Referral Code Turkey 2026 — 1,000 km Free Supercharging
item.description: Tesla referral code for Turkey (Türkiye) 2026. Use code carlo719460 (Tesla tavsiye kodu) and get 1,000 km free Supercharging on your new Model 3 or Y. Referral program activated March 2026.
